title: Lesson Overview
content: Students meet a simple definition of AI: a computer helper made by people. They compare people helpers; ordinary tools; and AI helpers through a whole-class picture sort.
content_json: {"teacher_note":"Keep the definition short. The goal is not technical accuracy in detail; it is a safe first idea for Grade 1."}

title: Opening Question
content: Ask: What helps us learn or solve problems at school? Accept people; classroom tools; and computer examples.
content_json: {"teacher_note":"Write or display three simple words: person; tool; computer helper.","student_prompt":"Who or what helps us do a job?"}

title: Teacher-Led Flow
content: Teach the simple definition; model one card; sort picture cards as a class; invite students to explain choices using because.
content_json: {"steps":["Say: AI is a computer helper made by people.","Show one people helper card and one ordinary tool card.","Model one AI helper card such as a translation app.","Invite students to place cards into three groups.","Ask students to explain one choice with: I think it goes here because..."],"teacher_note":"If students disagree; treat it as reasoning practice rather than a right-now test."}

title: Discussion Prompts
content: Use short prompts after sorting: Is this a person; a tool; or a computer helper? Who made it? What job does it help with?
content_json: {"prompts":["Is this a person; a tool; or a computer helper?","Who made it?","What job does it help with?","Could it make a mistake?"],"sentence_frame":"I think it is a ___ because ___."}

title: Misconceptions and Pitfalls
content: Students may think AI is a robot or a person. Gently repeat that AI is made by people and works inside some computer tools.
content_json: {"watch_for":["Students call every computer AI","Students think AI is alive","Students focus only on robots"],"teacher_moves":["Say: Some computer tools use AI; some do not.","Say: AI is made by people; it is not a person.","Ask: What job is this helper doing?"]}

title: Assessment Guidance
content: Listen for whether students can use the words computer helper and because when explaining a sorted example.
content_json: {"look_for":["Uses the phrase computer helper or similar language","Names one AI helper example","Explains a sorting choice with because","Understands that AI is made by people"],"not_yet_ok":"It is acceptable if students say maybe. The focus is early reasoning."}

title: Family Connection
content: Optional home conversation: Ask someone at home what tools help the family during the day. Students do not need to use any app or account.
content_json: {"send_home_note":"Ask about helpful tools at home. Do not ask students to use AI tools or share private information."}
